channel.title: Objects on Design Moodboard Archive
channel.description: Recent content in Objects on Design Moodboard Archive

item.title: Global Home Objects Source
item.description: Add favorite products, shipping notes, and source links here.

item.title: Hey House
item.description: Add notes about favorite pieces, price range, shipping, and anything worth remembering.

item.title: Indian Art Source
item.description: Add favorite pieces, source links, artist notes, and price range here.

item.title: Indian Lighting Source
item.description: Add favorite fixtures, bulb notes, dimensions, and source links here.

item.title: International Art Source
item.description: Add favorite pieces, source links, shipping notes, and artist details here.

item.title: International Lighting Source
item.description: Add favorite fixtures, dimensions, shipping notes, and source links here.

item.title: Kids Room Source
item.description: Add favorite pieces, age range, and source notes here.

item.title: Stores / Jewelry
item.description: Use this collection for jewelry stores, sculptural wearable objects, metalwork, stones, and craft references.

item.title: Stores / Kids
item.description: Use this collection for kids decor, small furniture, bedding, toys, textiles, and playful room ideas.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Art / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian art sources, wall pieces, sculptural objects, paintings, prints, and handmade artworks.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Art / International
item.description: Use this collection for international art sources, prints, sculpture, wall pieces, and object-like artworks.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Home
item.description: Home object source lists, split into Indian and International.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Home / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian home object sources and room-finishing details.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Home / International
item.description: Use this collection for global home object sources and decorative references.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Lighting / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian lighting stores and handmade fixture references.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Lighting / International
item.description: Use this collection for international lighting stores and fixture references.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Textile / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian textile sources, rugs, cushions, wall textiles, fabric artwork, and pattern-based pieces.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Textile / International
item.description: Use this collection for global textile sources, tapestries, rugs, cushions, and fiber artwork references.
